$comment: SOURCE OF TRUTH for the Architecture contract container. Rules stay empty until a migrated slice needs one and Jon ratifies it. Dependency allowlist data lives here.
title: Architecture
summary: Architecture contract container for stack, dependency policy, repo/process, secrets, toolchain, validation, and deploy posture rules.

apps/web.summary: Static React workbench frontend aligned to the OpenHands page-pattern stack and themed to the kai-chattr token contract.
apps/web.runtime: Cloudflare Pages static build for clean kai-chattr; legacy chattr may use the same stack as the proving ground while preserving :8300 runtime seams.

enforcedBy: Pending Jon-ratified rules. Dependency allowlist data lives in this Architecture contract.
openItems: No architecture rules are locked in this file yet.
HeroUI is included in the apps/web target stack because OpenHands uses @heroui/react across its frontend primitives.
